name: Ride Together
description:
Soyez les bienvenu(e)s dans le ride du club BIKES (tag : BIKES)
But : le mode elastic permet de rester ensemble quelque soit les watts développés. Les plus faibles sont assurés de rester avec le leader !
Ce n’est pas une course.
Rejoins-nous ! ajoute le tag BIKES à ton pseudo Zwift et rejoins le club BIKES FRANCE
sur Companion

Discutez sur Discord: https://discord.gg/a8wYvgwOpens a new window

Notre Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZwiftBikesOpens a new window

Rejoignez-nous : https://www.bikesfrance.com/Opens a new window

Welcome to the BIKES club ride (tag: BIKES)

JOIN OUR NEW CLUB for non-french riders on Companion : club BIKES WORLD,
English spoken !
The idea is to bring together riders from all over the world, no matter where you come from, no matter your level, no matter if you are already in a club or not ; just have fun !

GOAL: Elastic mode allows everyone to stay together regardless of the watts generated. The weakest riders are guaranteed to stay with the leader!
This is not a race.

eventSubgroups.name: Ride Together (E)
eventSubgroups.description:
FRENCH :

Soyez les bienvenu(e)s à la sortie de groupe de la Team BIKES France (tag : BIKES-FR)

« Rouler seul c’est bien mais rouler en groupe et entre amis c’est encore mieux »

Rejoignez-nous tous les Lundi après midi pour un ride groupé à allure libre d'une durée de deux heures, il est ouvert à tous et tous les niveaux.
Le but de cette sortie est de pédaler tous ensemble dans la bonne humeur
On roule en peloton = ce n’est pas une course !

Discutez sur Discord avec nous pendant la sortie sur salon vocal Club Ride :
https://discord.gg/PaSg2bs9Tt

Découvrez-nous sur Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZwiftBikesFrance

Rejoignez officiellement la team BIKES-FR et profiter d’entraînements et de sorties privées et/ou des courses:
https://www.bikes-france.com/index.php/zwift/devenir-bikes-fr

ENGLISH :

Welcome to the BIKES Team France group ride (tag : BIKES-FR)
"Riding alone is good but riding in a group and with friends is even better".

Join us every Monday afternoon for a group ride at a free pace for two hours, it is open to all and all levels.
The goal of this ride is to pedal all together in a good mood
We ride in a pack = it's not a race!

Discuss on Discord with us during the ride on Club Ride voice room:
https://discord.gg/PaSg2bs9Tt

Discover us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZwiftBikesFrance

Officially join the BIKES-FR team and enjoy private training sessions and rides and/or races:
https://www.bikes-france.com/index.php/zwift/devenir-bikes-fr
Official website :
https://bikes-france.com

name: Ascenders Brunch Bunch Ride
description:
Welcome to [ASC] - Beanie's Brunch Bunch for a chilled ride around the virtual roads of Zwift. Each week the course will vary so, whether you're a beginner just starting out on your first group rides, recovering from injury, or just looking for a steady paced ride then come and join us. We aim to provide a safe encouraging ride for you to enjoy. You’ll be very welcome in the Brunch Bunch

This is a group ride and not a race so please respect the pace and ride with the group. The fence will be used to aid regrouping and politely remind those out front to ease back to the main group before the 60 second countdown ends. If you're a stronger confident rider then ride behind the Lead Beacon and lend a draft for others who may need it.

Ascenders Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/AscendersZwiftOpensOpens a new window a new window

Ascenders Discord Channel: https://discord.gg/cBfQ5jkrPh

name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the longest running daily led running event on Zwift. This was the event that kickstarted the NoblePro Running Club in support of a world record attempt at consecutive daily10k runs.
The event has a healthy group of leaders who are friendly and chatty and will help you achieve your goal, not matter your experience. Feel free to join in the chat and become addicted like we all are.

Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it's not a race.
If you don't want to run 10k then come along for as long as you wish, the support is always appreciated.
The event runs at the same time each day, each day of the week there is a different course.

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/

https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

eventSubgroups.name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro (E)

name: Workout 3 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 3: Cadence Mastery
Dial in your cadence and watch everything else fall into place. This workout will have you switching between high and low cadence, all while keeping power steady, so outdoor riding feels more composed.

name: TBR Ride and Shine
description:
Mental Wellness and Sprints!!!
TBR Ride and Shine is a group ride at 1.8-2w/kg, with some Mental Wellness chat and optional sprint efforts and re-grouping.
Each ride there will be wellness topics of interest to hopefully promote a positive mindset with tools to fight a ferocious black dog.
We have a sweep crew so please shout out if you need some help, but this flat route should keep riders nice and tight.
We don't use the fence for this ride as we believe all riders should exercise self-control and respect the ride leader by riding with the yellow beacon at all times. Your co-operation helps us provide everyone with a fun, supportive and inclusive ride.
Follow The Big Ring (TBR) at www.thebigring.cc

eventSubgroups.name: TBR Ride and Shine (D)
eventSubgroups.description:
TBR Knights of Suburbia is a group ride focusing on wellness, consistent with a category C ride at 1.8-2.2w/kg. 
A social roll with some quality mental wellness chat. Each ride there will be topics of interest to hopefully promote a positive mindset with tools to fight a ferocious black dog. 

WE ROLL DEEP. WE ROLL FOR BODY. WE ROLL FOR MIND. WE ROLL FOR OURSELVES. WE ROLL FOR OTHERS. WE ROLL TOGETHER. WE ROLL APART. BUT WHEN WE ROLL, WE KNOW WE’RE NEVER ALONE. Don’t forget, GET YOUR SILLY ON!    

We don't use the fence for this ride as we believe all riders should exercise self-control and respect the ride leader by riding with the yellow beacon at all times. Your co-operation helps us provide everyone with a fun, supportive and inclusive ride.

Follow TBR at thebigring.cc to learn more about our events, read ride reports and leave feedback.

#tbr

name: The Stampede Challenge by Herd Racing
description:
Join Herd Racing for our monthly TT challenge. For the month of January
it's 2 laps of Handful of Gravel. You can race this as many times as you'd
like and try to beat your time and your best time counts in the monthly
standings https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=3093

For these events drafting is turned off, so it's just you and the clock. Is
the gravel, the MTB or the TT bike fastest? Maybe even a road bike?!?!
Pick your fastest equipment and give it your best shot! Join us in the Herd
Racing League facebook or Discord server to chat pacing strategies, gear,
and more.
https://discord.gg/DrAXaCb7Tq

name: PACK🐺 SUB2 Weekend Recovery
description:
Hard Weekend, long rides, recovery needed or just fancy a spin, well you have come to the right place! Enjoy the steady pace of around 1.8w/kg while having a social chat, let us know what you got up to over the weekend as we ride together. It’s a great introduction to group riding with full pace instructions via text and voice chat using discord with sweeps helping at the back. You can sign up early via the web or mobile app and late join is enabled.

All riders will appear in the same kit and you can optionally add (PACK) after your name to show support of the group. Please respect the pace set by the leader, this is a group ride not a race. #strongertogether

Finally, if you are just starting your zwift experience, please join our facebook group and PACK Club for tips on group riding, friendly advice and to answer any questions you have.

PACK Club:
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/Pack/join

Facebook Group #zwiftpack
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/

PACK Events:
https://zwift.com/events/tag/pack

Discord Voice Chat:
https://discord.gg/cce7ers

Zwiftpower Team:
https://www.zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=2928

C) 6–6.5 mph // 9.5–10.5 kph
D) 5–5.5 mph // 8–9 kph

We’ll be using workout mode throughout these runs so everyone can easily determine their speed. Though these runs utilize a mostly steady pace, there will be some speed changes for variety.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Run in general, then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook Group or zwift.com/run

#gozwiftrun #mrc

name: TEAM ITALY From Walk to Run 5K
description:
WELCOME TO ALL RUNNERS! 5Km running is your goal? This is a Run-Walk-Run event, that which will help you to start running, to return after an injury, to increase your training or simply to train for weelness. The event is structured as workouts to give you the opportunity to manage the paces according to your personal pace references for a functional aerobic improvement training. Each workout will include initial walking warm up, so please set your treadmills to exit the starting pen all in group walking and follow the subsequent messages on the screen. The Running Division of Team Italy is a new reality that is added to the already more acclaimed Bike Division. It was born from the passion between two runner friends, zwift users, and boss of Team, which we thanks. So, we hope you enjoy with us. Also in the other events, which you can find on our Facebook page. Please, add tag [ITA] after your name. Stay connected with other runners via our Team Italy Discord Server (Running/Corsa Section - Audio Channel) https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv

This is the Facebook group of Team Italy Runners https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/

 , and Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly

 Join us! Have fun! Run On!. #zwiftrunningitaly #teamitaly Benvenuti a tutti i Runners ! Il vostro obiettivo è quello di correre 5km?Questo è un evento Corsa-Camminata-Corsa, che potrà aiutarvi ad iniziare a correre, a rientrare dopo un infortunio, ad incrementare il vostro allenamento o semplicemente per il benessere. L’evento è strutturato come workouts per darvi la possibilità di gestire le andature secondo i vostri personali riferimenti di passo per un allenamento funzionale di miglioramento aerobico. Ogni workouts prevedrà un riscaldamento camminando, quindi vi preghiamo di impostare i vostri Tapis Roulant per uscire dalla griglia di partenza tutti in gruppo camminando e seguire a video i successivi messaggi. La Divisione Running del Team Italy è una recente realtà aggiunta alla già acclamata divisione Cycling. Nata dalla passione di due amici runners, utenti Zwift, ed il Boss del Team Italy, che ringraziamo. Grazie anche a voi, ed alla vostra passione questa realtà sta crescendo e divenendo sempre più attiva. Per tutte le info necessarie potete trovare la nostra pagina Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/

 La pagina del Team Italy: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly

 ed il canale Discord, Running audio channel, per tenerci in contatto: https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv

name: ZTBR - Training Stabilization TTT
description:
Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] together with Assessoria Franklin Almeida, provides this training with a focus on providing better "Stabilization" in the performance of athletes seeking better performance in Team Time Trial (TTT) events.

This training aims to help the athlete tolerate and withstand an accumulation of substrates produced by the body in sub-maximal activities, bringing more stability and control in time-based tests.

Franklin Almeida Consulting was created in 2005, with the aim of evaluating the physiological profile, developing training to improve your physical capacity, health and maximum performance.
One of the pioneers in distance consulting in Brazil!

Note: We will have other phases of this training in addition to Stabilization, they are: (Training for FTP Gains and Terrain Variations).

===
Português:
Treino de Estabilização by Franklin Almeida

Descrição: O Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] juntamente com a Assessoria Franklin Almeida, disponibiliza este treino com foco em proporcionar melhor "Estabilização" na performance de atletas que buscam um melhor desempenho nos eventos tipo Team Time Trial (TTT).

Esse treino tem o objetivo de ajudar o atleta a tolerar e suportar um acúmulo de sustratos produzidos pelo organismo em atividades sub máximas trazendo mais estabilidade e controle em provas de conta relógio.

A Consultoria Franklin Almeida foi criada em 2005, com o objetivo de avaliar o perfil fisiológico, desenvolver treinos para melhorar sua capacidade física, sua saúde e desempenho máximo.
Um dos pioneiros em consultoria a distância no Brasil!

Obs.: Teremos outras fases deste treinamento além da Estabilização, são elas: (Treino para Ganhos de FTP e Variações de terreno).

name: Team VTO Chilltown Ride
description:
Kick off your week with Team VTO’s Chilltown Ride – a relaxed and social group ride with the option to turn up the heat on each lap!

This ride is perfect for anyone looking to ease into the week, spin out the legs, or just enjoy a good vibe with friendly riders. Not a race – but we do throw in optional sprint segments each lap for those who want a little extra effort before regrouping with the bunch.

Ride Highlights:
🚴‍♂️ Social pace with Beacon
⚡ Optional sprints each lap
🔁 Regroup after efforts
📣 Friendly banter encouraged
🚫 No sweeper – just stick with the bunch
🌟 Great for new Zwifters learning group dynamics

It’s like meeting up with your mates for a cruise and chat – just in Watopia. Whether you’re sprinting or just spinning, you’re welcome here.

Join us every Monday at 7:00PM AEST (local time adjusted) and roll into the week with Chilltown vibes! 😎

For more info on Team VTO check us out on Bookface or your Zwift Companion Club

eventSubgroups.name: Team VTO Chilltown Ride (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
Chill out and chat for 50 mins with one of the most friendly squads in the Zwift
world.
We welcome everyone to get involved in the chat 💬 and lend support.
With a focus of FUN 😂, FRIENDSHIP 👫 and DETERMINATION 💪🏻, Team Zwift Tri Oz
is where the Australia & NZ Triathlon Community get together to chat. We are
affiliated with Triathlon Australia as an e-mutlisport squad and welcome all our
friends from around the world join our community.
To join our Zwift club for invitation to special events and win prizes 🏆
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/151ca95c-f6de-4fe2-ae88-a769e367f439/home
To join our FB group 💬; www.facebook.com/groups/thenewzwifttrioz/
Follow us on instagram 📸 @zwifttrioz

name: CRYO-GEN & ZLDR Monday Run.
description:
Join our CRYO-GEN & ZLDR 10K RUN to start your new week. It is our collaborative event between CRYO-GEN and ZLDR. The goals are to run together, share the FUN and stay healthy as one zwift run community.

To find out more about Team CRYO-GEN and what we can offer you, please visit our website https://cryogen.team/

If you wish to join us on Discord for this run, please join our server here - https://discord.gg/MkEpFwNz

name: Zwift Racing League Recon Ride (Team Zwift Philippines)
description:
This ZRL Group Recon Ride is led by Team Zwift Philippines (https://www.zwift.com/clubs/4f16b64b-60d5-414e-a4fc-91d6924ab305

Zwift Racing League Group Recon Rides are the official non-competitive Group Rides. Each one is hosted/run by a participating club and will feature racing tips and tricks for the race ahead, an opportunity to ask questions relating to Zwift Racing League and to preview the full course for Tuesday’s ZRL races.

THE AIM
With experienced ride leaders and Zwifters from a reputable Zwift Club, this is your opportunity to ask questions about all things ZRL-related. You'll be able to learn useful course and team tactics and if you are new to ZRL - perhaps even find a team to race with too!

There are multiple Group Recon Rides to choose from each day at various times and each will operate at the advertised paces (pace is based on your Zwift Pace Group).

WHAT IS THE ZRL?
Introducing the spectacular Zwift Racing League (ZRL) - a turbocharged online bike racing extravaganza that's rewriting the rules of competition. With a staggering 180 community divisions, 1,800 electrifying teams, and a whopping 14,000 fierce racers per 6-week round, the ZRL stands as the undisputed heavyweight champion of online bike racing competitions worldwide.

This high-octane spectacle is masterfully orchestrated by our powerhouse partners, WTRL, who leave no stone unturned in delivering an unparalleled racing experience. But remember, this race is an invitation-only affair, so if you dare to join the ranks of speed demons and thrill-seekers, you'll need to hitch a ride with one of the esteemed existing teams. Fear not, though, for WTRL's website (www.WTRL.racing) is your portal to all the insider intel - schedule, rules, and even a team that perfectly aligns with your fiery spirit!

If you want to gather your own team, you register for the next Round of ZRL at www.wtrl.racing/zwift-racing-league/.

#zrlrecon #wtrl #zrl #dirt

name: Workout 3 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 3: Cadence Mastery
Dial in your cadence and watch everything else fall into place. This workout will have you switching between high and low cadence, all while keeping power steady, so outdoor riding feels more composed.

name: DIRT 505 Monday Endurance Ride
description:
Welcome to the DIRT 505 Monday Endurance Ride!

Please join us weekly on Mondays at a pace of 2.6-2.8w/kg for 90 minutes.

The 505 rides take place Monday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday for 90 minutes at the same time and same consistent pace. Saturday's we ride for 120 minutes.

We kick off our rides with a 5 minute pace at 2.2w/kg to get us warmed up and together as a team. The fence is used throughout the ride to keep everyone together. The fence will not kick you off the ride but we do encourage all our riders to stay together as close to the beacon as possible. Our rides offer a 30 minute late join option.
The ride leader will stay as close to ride pace as possible. We try to change up the routes each week and some of the routes may include some small to moderate climbs.

Our group exists to encourage and build up cyclists around the world no matter your time zone, fitness level, pro or amateur. We exist to encourage and build up a team culture of unity in the cycling community.

STRAVA DIRT CLUB:

https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwiftdirt

FACEBOOK DIRT GROUP:

https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftdirt

name: The Velos Klick - 1km Challenge
description:
A klick is a military term for a distance of 1km, and so Team Velos brings you a challenge to complete 1km in the fastest time possible. We will change courses monthly (all Flat courses) and we will have winners from each category at the end of the month. Choose your bike very carefully as it could make all the difference, the challenge is available every night during the week use it as a warm up for a race or just use it to improve your 1km time or power figures, whatever just have fun.

Velos Klick
Downtown Dolphin

name: Stage 3: Pas Racing: Yumezi Grit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes — including the new Gravel Mountain map — in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Redrock Loop
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off at Redrock Loop on the brand-new Gravel Mountain map. A fast, punchy gravel test to set the tone. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Redrock Loop Reverse
Date: April 27 – May 3

Back for more on the brand new Gravel Mountain map. One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Southern Coast Cruise
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: EZR Speedy EZ Java Jam
description:
Get your week rolling with this fun-filled 60 minute group ride. Whether you are new to Zwift or group rides, looking for a recovery/rehab ride, or just looking to ride with a supportive group of friends, this ride is for you. The ride leader will be staying within the advertised average pace of this ride as we explore Zwift’s various worlds. Please respect the ride leader’s pace and ride with the yellow beacon.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/kmfS4YN

Facebook Page: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZER.Cycling

#zer #ezr #ezriders

name: Brownlee Fitness Hare & Hounds
description:
Brownlee Fitness welcomes you to a Monday hare and hounds style event where 4 groups leave at 1 minute intervals and try to catch the group in front. Work together with your group to stay ahead or catch the group in front. 

A great way to build some fitness ahead of race season.

name: Zwift Epic Race - The Muckle Yin
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - The Fan Flats
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: GRIT Easy Ride
description:
The ride will begin with a warm-up around 2.5 w/kg for 5-10 minutes. After the warm-up, the beacon will increase the pace to 3.0-3.2 w/kg. Riders are asked to respect the beacon, stay with the group, and enjoy a relaxing spin. Help keep the peloton together by limiting power on hills and maintaining a moderate pace.
Optional: Use this ride to warm up for GRIT’s Micro Madness Group Workout. This HIIT-style workout immediately follows Easy Ride and can help you add a dose of intensity to your riding routine.
Embrace your inner easy and start your week with GRIT!
GRIT: Great Rides for Intense Training

eventSubgroups.name: GRIT Easy Ride (B)
eventSubgroups.description:
This is planned as a recovery ride to allow riders to ride an easy pace after some hard weekend events.

All our GRIT rides start with an easy warmup pace around 2.5 w/kg for about 10 minutes. All riders are asked to stay together during this warmup section. Please help the group by keeping the peloton together during this warmup section. Ride at an easy pace at the front to avoid riders falling off the back.

After the warmup, all riders are asked to ride at 3.0 w/kg. This is an easy ride to help with recovery from weekend events. Please help us keep the group together at this easy pace of 3.0 w/kg.
This will be a fun social event so plan to enjoy a workout with friendly riders. We will limit power on hills to keep riders together.

name: KISS at Base Training Ride
description:
Join us to work on your endurance and power output at your aerobic threshold (AT) in Zone 2. The exercise will give you endurance and increased performance using fat as energy. A well-developed AT can give you better race performance increase the amount of time before your body uses glycogen stores.

We are now offering four separate paced rides to better accommodate various fitness levels. 
The A cat is for riders with zone 2 higher than 3.99
The B cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 3.2 - 3.99 w/kg. 
The C cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 2.5 - 3.19 w/kg.
The D cat is for riders with Zone 2 between 2.0 - 2.5 w/kg.

Remember this when you approach hills and inclines along the way. Stick together to enjoy the draft and companionship. The ride leader will not exceed the advertised pace at any time - even on hills. Please keep an eye on the leader beacon (yellow) and the sweeper beacon (red) to stay in the blob.

So turn on your graph (press G on computer keyboard or select it from on-screen menu in iOS and Android) and paint it blue. Give the body a good foundation for Zwift racing. Discord server Link: https://discord.gg/kBmXhY2

name: The HERD M2C2
description:
JOIN THE MONDAY MORNING COFFEE CREW!

New to Zwift? Raced hard over the weekend? Just need reason to get moving on a Monday? Join The Herd for the most chill ride on Zwift served with coffee (virtual, of course). This ride is the perfect place to start if you want to become a stronger rider and gain the knowledge and confidence to try other group rides and even the races or tours that fill the Zwift Events calendar. 

Respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back.

Join us on Discord during the ride to participate in audio conversation with one another. It will help the time pass by and give you a space to ask all the questions you have about Zwift and Cycling in general: https://discord.gg/HSrx2Cz6wu

 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/
 Strava:      http://www.strava.com/groups/zHerd/

#herd

eventSubgroups.description:
JOIN THE MONDAY MORNING COFFEE CREW!

New to Zwift? Raced hard over the weekend? Just need reason to get moving on a Monday? Join The Herd for the most chill ride on Zwift served with coffee (virtual, of course). This ride is the perfect place to start if you want to become a stronger rider and gain the knowledge and confidence to try other group rides and even the races or tours that fill the Zwift Events calendar. 

Respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back.

Join us on Discord during the ride to participate in audio conversation with one another. It will help the time pass by and give you a space to ask all the questions you have about Zwift and Cycling in general: https://discord.gg/HSrx2Cz6wu

 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/
 Strava:      http://www.strava.com/groups/zHerd/

#herd

name: Epictour - Structured Workout
description:
#Startyourweek with Epictour!

This is a short and intense ride! Our ride leader, Josh, will lead you through a 45min interval workout, with intervals at over your FTP value between 105% and 120%. Rubberband is in effect so that no matter how many watts you push, everyone will stick together. 

We are a friendly and welcoming bunch that like to work hard - if you've never ridden an Epictour ride, today is great day to start! 

This event is recurring. Same time next week with a new workout! 

Notes: 

- You will default to ERG mode.  If you prefer your smart trainer to not auto adjust resistance, deselect ERG in the menu before the ride to bring you to SIM mode ( https://support.zwift.com/en_us/erg-mode-in-workouts-SkQJC8OEH )

- The displayed peloton speed will be slower than anticipated. This will not affect your workout, but it is a quirky feature.

Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/QK9vVdFjUJ

If you have questions about tech set-up for zwift or cycling in general, please feel free to message us on our social platforms, we would be happy to help you where we can!

https://www.instagram.com/epictourgranfondo/
https://www.facebook.com/Epictourgranfondo
https://www.strava.com/clubs/epic-tour

Epictour is a cyclist-first company from Toronto, Canada, producing events, training programs and offering high-quality products. Our signature event is Epictour, the GTA's Granfondo. Sept 12 2021.
www.epictour.ca/check-us-out

name: CRYO-GEN Wheelie Fun Recovery Ride
description:
Join CRYO-GEN for a recovery spin designed to wake the legs up, flush them out, and leave you feeling better than when you started.

We’ll stay mostly in the gray zone with a cadence of 80+ rpm. On small inclines, please go sub 2. Remember to gear down, and spin up to keep the effort light. The focus is on a smooth pedal stroke, good form, and steady blood flow to support recovery. The red beacon will roll at a more relaxed pace if needed.

This is a social, supportive ride where the goal isn’t speed — it’s recovery.

There are no sweepers on this ride so everyone can stay comfortably in their own recovery zone. This is your ride — spin easy, chat, and do what works for you, as long as you’re truly recovering.

Think of this as the perfect reset to get you ready for your next workout, race, or climb.

Come spin the legs and start the week feeling good. 🚴‍♀️

HEALTH: We would advise any rider who is attempting a Zwift ride for the first time to ensure that their health should always take precedence over completing any ride. If you feel unwell or unable to continue please STOP

NOTE: Exercise contributes to 25% weight loss; Healthy Eating (Not Diet) contributes to the other 75%. Be fit and Healthy.

CRYOGEN Race STRAVA Club https://www.strava.com/clubs/CRYO-GEN

CRYOGEN Social STRAVA Club https://www.strava.com/clubs/474562

Team CRYO-GEN Race Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/176410539698267

Team CRYO-GEN Social Facebook Group https://www.facebook.com/groups/1960420317596866/

name: Workout 3 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 3: Cadence Mastery
Dial in your cadence and watch everything else fall into place. This workout will have you switching between high and low cadence, all while keeping power steady, so outdoor riding feels more composed.

name: DWGZ Endurance – Mocha Monday
description:
Welcome to DWGZ (Determined Witty Gritty Zwifters) — a global crew of cyclists who show up with grit, humor, heart, and the kind of energy that lifts the whole group. DWGZ builds more than fitness — we build emotional endurance, community strength, and the kind of camaraderie that makes even the toughest weeks feel lighter.

Our Mocha Monday Endurance Ride is a smoother, steadier session — the perfect recovery-style spin after a big weekend of rides. Expect relaxed vibes and plenty of the trademark DWGZ banter that makes early mornings a little more fun. This is your chance to shake out the legs, reconnect with the crew, and ease into the week with good energy.

Whether you’re rebuilding the engine, looking for friendly wheels to spin with, or just wanting to start your Monday with supportive community, you’re in the right place.

Ride Categories
🚴 B Category – 3.2–4.0 w/kg

🚴 C Category – 2.6–3.2 w/kg

**🚴 C Category – 1.5-2.5 w/kg
**

Expect consistent endurance pacing, smooth rotation, and a welcoming group from yellow beacon to sweep. Every pocket of the ride is built on teamwork, connection, and that signature DWGZ vibe.

DWGZ rides run Monday through Saturday at 6:05 AM Eastern (US) — each one an opportunity to build strength, connection, and global community.

Clip in, sip the vibes, and roll into the week with us.

Mocha Monday is served. ☕🚴‍♂️

About DIRT
Team DIRT is an acronym for Dads Inside Riding Trainers — a community that has grown to include like-minded moms and dads who balance training with work and family life. A global tribe with a great vibe that makes you want to ride, DIRT is built on connection, encouragement, and fitting fitness into real life.

Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/sUnwqPZ

And on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZWIFTDIRT

name: SZR Lazy Birdies
description:
Welcome to SZR Lazy Birdies

This is a group ride, not fast and furious but fun and entertaining. We focus on remaining together. Please stay between Yellow and Red for the best experience. Expect fantastic leadership and quick banter.

Our pace will average between 2.5-2.7, but can vary within the ride… There might be times where we hit a slightly higher pace, but we will always recover…

Bring your best banter and lazy legs and enjoy.

name: Stage 3: Pas Racing: Yumezi Grit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes — including the new Gravel Mountain map — in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Redrock Loop
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off at Redrock Loop on the brand-new Gravel Mountain map. A fast, punchy gravel test to set the tone. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Redrock Loop Reverse
Date: April 27 – May 3

Back for more on the brand new Gravel Mountain map. One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: MIRT Monday Morning Mellow (MMMM)
description:
Welcome to the MIRT Monday Morning Mellow - MMMM (formerly know as DIRT Monday Morning Blues Ride) by team DIRT!

All are welcome to join us for a social group ride to wave goodbye to the weekend and start off the work week. We will have the "everyone stays together" option enabled so that you can ride whatever pace you feel like. As long as you are pedaling, whatever the power output, we will stay grouped together. 30-minute late join is enabled.

Discover more about Team DIRT and connect with us on
Discord at https://discord.gg/sUnwqPZ
Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZWIFTDIRT
Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/ZWIFTDIRT

name: DIRT Run Club
description:
Join us weekly on Monday mornings for a 5k group run with team DIRT. All
paces and abilities are welcome.

We will be interacting socially live on our discord voice and video channel
at http://discord.gg/sUnwqPZ

Team DIRT is an acronym for Dads Inside Riding Trainers. We are a
brotherhood like-minded dads and moms who love to make time for Zwift
around work and family.

name: ZTBR - Training Stabilization TTT
description:
Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] together with Assessoria Franklin Almeida, provides this training with a focus on providing better "Stabilization" in the performance of athletes seeking better performance in Team Time Trial (TTT) events.

This training aims to help the athlete tolerate and withstand an accumulation of substrates produced by the body in sub-maximal activities, bringing more stability and control in time-based tests.

Franklin Almeida Consulting was created in 2005, with the aim of evaluating the physiological profile, developing training to improve your physical capacity, health and maximum performance.
One of the pioneers in distance consulting in Brazil!

Note: We will have other phases of this training in addition to Stabilization, they are: (Training for FTP Gains and Terrain Variations).

===
Português:
Treino de Estabilização by Franklin Almeida

Descrição: O Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] juntamente com a Assessoria Franklin Almeida, disponibiliza este treino com foco em proporcionar melhor "Estabilização" na performance de atletas que buscam um melhor desempenho nos eventos tipo Team Time Trial (TTT).

Esse treino tem o objetivo de ajudar o atleta a tolerar e suportar um acúmulo de sustratos produzidos pelo organismo em atividades sub máximas trazendo mais estabilidade e controle em provas de conta relógio.

A Consultoria Franklin Almeida foi criada em 2005, com o objetivo de avaliar o perfil fisiológico, desenvolver treinos para melhorar sua capacidade física, sua saúde e desempenho máximo.
Um dos pioneiros em consultoria a distância no Brasil!

Obs.: Teremos outras fases deste treinamento além da Estabilização, são elas: (Treino para Ganhos de FTP e Variações de terreno).

name: ZLDR AYOP Hour Run
description:
Join Zwift Long-Distance Runners (ZLDR) run club for a 1 hour AYOP (at your own pace) run. Whether you want to push for a new personal best, use it as part of your weekly training program or just enjoy a sociable run this is suitable for you.

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020
Strava Club: https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020
Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/
Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWyn

#zldr_run

name: Zwift Epic Race - The Muckle Yin
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial

name: ZWC Hill Climb Battle
description:
Welcome to the Team ZWC Hill Climb Battle!
Is this a race? Yes, but it is also a highly effective workout to improve your fitness.
Boost your FTP  by going full gas on climbs and racing one another!

POWER UPs:Allowed at all times
BIKES:All allowed

GROUPS:
Use your FTP and then divide by your weight in kg then pick the correct group:
A:4.0 W/kg FTP+
B:3.2 W/kg to 3.9 W/kg FTP
C:2.5 W/kg to 3.1 W/kg FTP
D:Under 2.4 W/kg FTP

Have Fun! Ride On!!


Team ZWC Hill Climb Battle

毎週月曜日に開催のヒルクライムレース!!
Zwift屈指のヒルクライムコース、Franceの「Mont Ventoux」を登るルートLa Reineを中心に
Mountain Route,Mountain 8のルートは「Epic KOM」「Epic KOM Reverse」を登りその先にある「ラジオタワー」の激坂を登った山頂ゴールになります。

世界中のZwifterと競い合うことでワークアウト以上の刺激とトレーニング効果が期待できます。

Zwifterの参加をお待ちしています。

POWER UPs:アイテム使用可能
BIKES:全ての自転車を選択可能

カテゴリーに関して
あなたのFTPを体重で割った数値をパワーウエイトレシオ【○○W/kg】となります。
例：FTP250W、体重60kgの方は4.166W/kgになりますのでAカテゴリーを選択下さい。
FTPとはサイクリストが1時間を通して維持できるパワーになります。
FTPの数値がわからない方はZwift Workout内のFTPテストで計測出来ます。

A:4.0W/kg FTP以上の方
B:3.2W/kg～3.9W/kg FTPの方
C:2.5W/kg～3.1W/kg FTPの方
D:2.4W/kg FTP以下の方

Have Fun! Ride On!!

#ZwiftJapan #ZwiftWarriorsCycling #FunisFast #zwc #japan #japanrace

D:2.4W/kg FTP以下の方

Have Fun! Ride On!!

#ZwiftJapan #ZwiftWarriorsCycling #FunisFast #zwc #japan #japanrace

eventSubgroups.name: ZWC Hill Climb Battle (D)
eventSubgroups.description:
Welcome to the Team ZWC Hill Climb Battle!
Is this a race? Yes, but it is also a highly effective workout to improve your fitness.
Boost your FTP  by going full gas on climbs and racing one another!

POWER UPs:Allowed at all times
BIKES:All allowed

GROUPS:
Use your FTP and then divide by your weight in kg then pick the correct group:
A:4.0 W/kg FTP+
B:3.2 W/kg to 3.9 W/kg FTP
C:2.5 W/kg to 3.1 W/kg FTP
D:Under 2.4 W/kg FTP

Have Fun! Ride On!!


Team ZWC Hill Climb Battle

毎週月曜日に開催のヒルクライムレース!!
Zwift屈指のヒルクライムコース、Franceの「Mont Ventoux」を登るルートLa Reineを中心に
Mountain Route,Mountain 8のルートは「Epic KOM」「Epic KOM Reverse」を登りその先にある「ラジオタワー」の激坂を登った山頂ゴールになります。

世界中のZwifterと競い合うことでワークアウト以上の刺激とトレーニング効果が期待できます。

Zwifterの参加をお待ちしています。

POWER UPs:アイテム使用可能
BIKES:全ての自転車を選択可能

カテゴリーに関して
あなたのFTPを体重で割った数値をパワーウエイトレシオ【○○W/kg】となります。
例：FTP250W、体重60kgの方は4.166W/kgになりますのでAカテゴリーを選択下さい。
FTPとはサイクリストが1時間を通して維持できるパワーになります。
FTPの数値がわからない方はZwift Workout内のFTPテストで計測出来ます。

A:4.0W/kg FTP以上の方
B:3.2W/kg～3.9W/kg FTPの方
C:2.5W/kg～3.1W/kg FTPの方
D:2.4W/kg FTP以下の方

Have Fun! Ride On!!

#ZwiftJapan #ZwiftWarriorsCycling #FunisFast #zwc #japan #japanrace

name: GXY BANDWAGON – (CAT D)
description:
ALL INCLUSIVE BANDED SOCIAL GROUP RIDE.
TIME TO RELEASE THE PRESSURES OF MODERN DAY LIFE WITH THIS DAILY FUN GET
TOGETHER.
THESE EVENTS WILL BE LAP OR TIME BASED GENERALLY UP TO 90 MINUTES IN DURATION.
(CELEBRITY SWEEPER INCLUDED)
GXY are a friendly, open and inclusive cycling club, who ride together virtually and in real life. Whether you ride
socially, race, train with intent or just like to mix it up, you are always welcome.
Here, together.
https://discord.com/channels/922817854372478986/1472960938612101150
If you would like to join our community, you can find us here:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

name: Monday Run Club
description:
Start your week off right with a group run hosted by the Zwift Runners Facebook Group. We’ll ease into another week of training alongside the community while actively recovering from any long runs you might have had during the weekend. With runs in seven time slots with four pace groups each (A being the fastest and D being the slowest), there’s an event for everyone. 

Pace Groups
A) 7.5–8.5 mph // 12–14 kph
B) 7–7.5 mph // 10.5–12 kph
C) 6–6.5 mph // 9.5–10.5 kph
D) 5–5.5 mph // 8–9 kph

We’ll be using workout mode throughout these runs so everyone can easily determine their speed. Though these runs utilize a mostly steady pace, there will be some speed changes for variety.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Run in general, then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook Group or zwift.com/run

#gozwiftrun #mrc

name: MHG Run Club
description:
Back in January 2021, Eddie Izzard ran 32 marathons in 31 days. Our community rallied together and joined the action all month long. This inspired us to create the MHG Run Club, which continues Eddie’s incredible efforts of making humanity great.

The MHG Run Club motivates and supports everybody, whether you’re looking for tips to achieve your training goals or looking for a group to bond and socialize with. A light-minded Zwift treadmill runners group, for runners of all abilities, friendly chat and a good laugh :)

Please feel free to join me Clive Finnimore with our official MHG Run Club Lunchtime 5K @ 8KPH on Monday, Wednesday & Fridays, See you there soon :)

Please also join us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/252358412942586/
Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/MHGA
Keep on Running

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (B)

name: PAOLO BARBERA & SCANNELLATORI SERIALI WORKOUT
description:
"Scannellatori Seriali" is a large community of cyclists, triathletes, and runners. We invite you to join our community by following our Instagram page at https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/ or contacting us on Facebook.
 
Coach Paolo Barbera (Please visit www.heycoach.it )   is a Certified Triathlon and Ironman Coach and the founder of Active Kids, a sporting clinic to help children and adults in the prevention and treatment of obesity through healty nutrition and tailored training programs

Paolo is an experienced thriathlete and cyclist, in 2017 opened an endurance training center in milan, Tri60, specilized in indoor training.

In the last ten years Paolo has developed training programs for triathletes, runners and cyclists. Indoor training plays a key role to control pace, cadence and mental strenght.

Paolo’s workouts are designed to mix different training zones aiming to maximize results in a very short time. Paolo’s coachees by following his workouts, at the right intensity, have achieved challenging results.

name: Epictour - Structured Workout
description:
#Startyourweek with Epictour!

This is a short and intense ride! Our ride leader, Danica, will lead you through a 45min interval workout, with intervals at over your FTP value between 105% and 120%. Rubberband is in effect so that no matter how many watts you push, everyone will stick together. 

We are a friendly and welcoming bunch that like to work hard - if you've never ridden an Epictour ride, today is great day to start! 

This event is recurring. Same time next week with a new workout! 

Notes: 

- You will default to ERG mode.  If you prefer your smart trainer to not auto adjust resistance, deselect ERG in the menu before the ride to bring you to SIM mode ( https://support.zwift.com/en_us/erg-mode-in-workouts-SkQJC8OEH ) or you can change it in game. 

- The displayed peloton speed will be slower than anticipated. This will not affect your workout, but it is a quirky feature

Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/QK9vVdFjUJ

If you have questions about tech set-up for zwift or cycling in general,
please feel free to message us on our social platforms, we would be happy
to help you where we can!

https://www.instagram.com/epictourgranfondo/
https://www.facebook.com/Epictourgranfondo
https://www.strava.com/clubs/epic-tour

Epictour is a cyclist-first company from Toronto, Canada, producing events,
training programs and offering high-quality products. Our signature event is Epictour, the GTA's Granfondo. Sept 12 2021.

www.epictour.ca/check-us-out

name: Workout 3 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 3: Cadence Mastery
Dial in your cadence and watch everything else fall into place. This workout will have you switching between high and low cadence, all while keeping power steady, so outdoor riding feels more composed.

name: Welcome to the Outback DIRT ride
description:
Righto, ya pack of legends! Time to saddle up for the DIRT Welcome to the Outback Ride—a C-grade roll that’ll sit between 2.5 and 3.2 W/kg. It’s a no-drop, good vibes only ride, so don’t go tearing off like a blue-arse fly, or you’ll be riding solo quicker than a backpacker who’s just met a drop bear.

We’ll be as fast as a mob of roos, but don’t stress—we’re here for a solid spin, not to go full gas like a bogan in a V8. Stick with the bunch, spin the legs, and enjoy the ride. If you get caught at the back, don’t panic—we’ll pull ya back in like a snag on a barbie.

This isn’t a race, so save the “I reckon I can hold 5 W/kg for an hour” for another day, champ. We’re here to ride, yarn, and maybe even throw in a “that’s not a ride… THIS is a ride” for good measure.

So slap on ya best Zwift kit (or if you’re feeling brave, your finest budgie smugglers), fill up ya bidons, and let’s get flat out like a lizard drinking. See ya on the start line, ya flamin’ legends!

eventSubgroups.description:
Welcome to the Outback – DIRT Ride

Righto, ya pack of legends! Time to saddle up for the DIRT Welcome to the Outback Ride—a C-grade roll that’ll sit between 2.5 and 3.2 W/kg. name: CHINA ZCRC Spicy 100km
description:
欢迎参加CHINA ZCRC Spicy 100km，这场100公里的长距离“辣堡”活动由ZCRC和G7 Cycling Club联名举办。

每周一的晚上，和小伙伴们一起相约进行一场100公里的长距离有氧训练，并且在最后的几公里来进行一场势均力敌的对决吧！

为了保证竞赛的公平性，请确保你已经正确校准了你的功率计，正确设置你的身高、体重和性别，佩戴心率带，否则你将可能被取消最终的比赛成绩并且被拉入黑名单。

同时，请确保你的能力符合你参加的比赛组别，我们一般以基于FTP的功率体重比来衡量车手的组别：

# A组水平要求：无限制

# B组水平要求：不得大于4.0w/kg

# C组水平要求：不得大于3.2w/kg

欢迎关注我们ZCRC的其他公开活动并且参与其中：

每周一 /北京时间 晚上19:05：
CHINA ZCRC Spicy 100km

每周三 /北京时间 晚上20:05：
CHINA ZCRC Group Training Ride

每周五 /北京时间 晚上20:00：
CHINA ZCRC Friday Indoor Race

每周六 /北京时间 晚上19:30：
CHINA ZCRC Winter Challenge Series

*欢迎你关注并且加入我们的其他社交平台和媒体：

*QQ群: 626918793
*微信群: hzw-hzw-hzw
*新浪微博: ZWIFT_CHINA
*Instagram: ZWIFT_CHINA

Welcome to CHINA ZCRC Spicy 100km, this ride is brought to you by ZCRC and G7 Cycling Club from China. 

Spicy 100K is a new different challenge for you to build up capacity of endurance and tempo, so you will keep most time of blur or green graph in this ride. Keep drafting and stay together for the first 95km and the last 5km will be a tough race to boost your full power.

The peloton will stay together for a steady pace on 3.2-3.6w/kg (230watts-250watts).

This is a public race so we warmly welcome zwifters from all over the world to participate in the race. Please calibrate your power meter and wear HRM for the fair. Keep smiling, keep attacking, keep handsome, we will live broadcast every race.

Make sure the group which you choose matches your power or you will be DQed:

# Group A: Unlimited

# Group B: No more than 4.0w/kg

# Group C: No more than 3.2w/kg

Following ZWIFT events about G7 Cycling Club:

# CHINA ZCRC Spicy 100km
(Monday 11:05 UTC)

# CHINA ZCRC Group Training Ride
(Wednesday 12:00 UTC)

# CHINA ZCRC Friday Indoor Race
(Friday 12:00 UTC)

# CHINA ZCRC Winter Challenge Series
(Saturday 11:30 UTC)

*If you are Chinese, we welcome you to join our QQ Group 626918793. If you are not, we welcome you to follow our Instagram account @zwift_china. We will post result of the race on both platforms.

Following ZWIFT events about G7 Cycling Club:
# Spicy 100K Race (Monday 11:05 UTC)
# Group Training Ride (Wednesday 12:00 UTC)
# Friday Indoor Race (Friday 12:00 UTC)
# Winter Challenge (Saturday 11:30 UTC)

*We are a online club for Chinese Zwift riders. So if you are Chinese, we welcome you to join our QQ Group 626918793. If you are not, we welcome you to follow our Instagram account @zwift_china. We will post details of the event on both platforms.

name: Stage 3: Pas Racing: Yumezi Grit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes — including the new Gravel Mountain map — in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Redrock Loop
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off at Redrock Loop on the brand-new Gravel Mountain map. A fast, punchy gravel test to set the tone. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Redrock Loop Reverse
Date: April 27 – May 3

Back for more on the brand new Gravel Mountain map. One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: Rising and Shining with Team Giant
description:
Are you looking for the perfect social ride to kick-start your week? Look no further than #rideandshineteamgiant to get your heart and legs pumping. 

The group will cruise around at 2.5-2.8 w/kg effort until the end, when the road turns uphill. The fence will get tossed aside, and every rider can attack the 3-6 min climb at their desired intensity. 

Race or Pace, it's up to you!

eventSubgroups.name: Rising and Shining with Team Giant  (C)

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Southern Coast Cruise
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

Zwift TT Club Racing - Southern Coast Cruise (B)
Zwift TT Club Racing - Southern Coast Cruise (C)
Zwift TT Club Racing - Southern Coast Cruise (D)

name: BMTR Banded Warmup
description:
Let's warm up and enjoy riding together as one group before today's BMTR Short Adventure event, which has two categories/groups: C and D. The event starts in 35 minutes.

Since this is a "banded" event, everyone can warm up at their own pace while the Zwift "Rubberband" feature keeps us together.

Although there won't be any official Yellow or Red Beacons for this event, you'll see familiar BMTR Ride Leaders and Sweeps joining you for some warm-up fun!

JOIN US
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/bmtrzwiftclub
- Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/BMTRZwiftClub
- Zwift: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/BMTR/home
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/bmtr.club

ALL WEEKLY BMTR EVENTS
- https://bmtr.events

BMTR CUSTOM CYCLING CLOTHING STORE:
- https://bmtrzwift.store

name: SAZ speed race
description:
a fast and fun ride to settle your quarrels with other zwifters. Get down to real, raw speed with this race hosted by SAZ(south african zwifters).
If you want to support the group put SAZ after your name and join our group on zpower.

name: Korea Base Ride
description:
혼자 타지 마세요! C카테고리(2.5~3.2w/kg) 속도로 거대한 팩을 이루어 함께 달립니다.

🛡️ 안전한 라이딩 쾌적한 진행을 위해 펜스가 작동하며, 오픈 전 BA는 금지됩니다. 리더를 믿고 체력을 아껴두세요.

🔥 마지막 승부 결승선 5~10km 전, OPEN 사인과 함께 진짜 레이스가 시작됩니다. 행운을 빕니다!

ENGLISH

Title: Ride Together, Race Later: ZWK Monday

Don’t ride solo! Join our massive C-Cat pack (2.5-3.2w/kg) and enjoy the draft.

🛡️ Ride Smart Fence is ON and No Breakaways allowed. Trust the Leader and save your energy.

🔥 The Finale The real race begins at the “OPEN” signal (Last 5~10km). Unleash your power then! Good luck!

eventSubgroups.name: Korea Base Ride (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
The pace is moderate (2.0- 2.5 W/kg) enough to ride while you can watch your favourite news. Please pace with other riders.

#korea

name: Fearless Ladder for a Faster 5k
description:
Want to improve your 5K run time. Join us regularly for this ladder workout and watch your results improve.

We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.” – Aristotle<https://everydaypower.com/aristotle-quotes/>

Join for the challenge and group run fun!

Hosted by Team Fearless. To hear about our other rides and runs or learn more about our women's team, head to our Facebook Fans page at https://www.facebook.com/groups/TeamFearlessZR/

#fear

name: JETT Base Ride (2.7~3.8w/kg)
description:
Welcome to Japan eSports Tempting Team Base Ride !
 Power :
B group- ave 3.3w/kg～3.9w/kg  
C group- ave.2.7w/kg～3.2w/kg
JETT Base Ride! Of course, ZWIFTer of all countries can participate. Leaders and heads pull groups at 3.3〜3.8w/kg. Riders who are hard at the above power should try grouping by using drafting well. 
If you leave the group behind, please offer with "HELP !!" and ZWIFT CAHT. Sweeper goes for support. Sweeper will not go for support unless he offers "HELP !!". Also, please offer within 10 seconds of time difference as much as possible.

Rule of this group ride 
· You always keep grouping in mind( this is not a race )
· Do not Lead from Leader - yellow beacon 
· Power Ups allowed ( do not use final Sprint )
· TT Bike allowed 
· Sprint is the last lap. (Do not sprint other than the last lap) 
Durable base training of about 110 minutes. Follow the leader's instructions, let's work together and make the best group, the best workout!

Japan ZWIFT Base Ride
B group- ave 3.3w/kg～3.9w/kg  
C group- ave.2.7w/kg～3.2w/kg
Japanese Base Ride! もちろん、全ての国のZWIFTerが参加できます。 リーダーおよび先頭は3.3〜3.8w/kgでグループを引っ張ります。上記のパワーでは辛いというライダーはドラフティングをうまく活用してグルーピングにトライして下さい。 
もし、集団から後方に離れてしまった場合、「HELP!!」とZWIFT CAHTで申し出てください。Sweeperが支援に向かいます。「HELP!!」の申し出がない限り、Sweeperは支援には行きません。また、可能な限りタイム差１０秒以内に申し出をお願いします。 
 このグループライドのルール
・常にグルーピングを心がけること(レースではありません）
・リーダーの黄色いビーコンよりも前に出ないこと（２０m以上） 
・Power Ups OK（最終スプリントは使用禁止） 
・TT Bike OK 
・スプリントはしないこと（最後の周のみ実施） 
約110分のベーストレーニング、リーダー指示に従い、みんなで協力して最高のグループ、最高のワークアウトにしましょう！ 
ライド中はZwiftPowerでライブ確認しましょう。 https://www.zwiftpower.com 

#jett #japan

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - The Fan Flats
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Break for Biscuits: Banded Recovery Ride
description:
🍪 Brake for Biscuits – Easy Spin, Maximum Munch

Take it easy, have a laugh, and keep your biscuit game strong. This is a no-drop recovery ride where watts take a back seat.

No sprints, no stress — just an hour of relaxed spinning and top-tier biscuit banter (cake and cookies welcome too).

Route: Flat-ish, biscuit-eating-friendly

Bring your legs, your best snack recommendations, and an appetite for recovery. In this peloton, biscuits come before watts.

eventSubgroups.name: Break for Biscuits: Banded Recovery Ride (E)

name: Tullio Turbo Lunch
description:
Welcome to the Tullio Turbo Lunch race series. These races are designed to offer an ‘active lunch’ and a quick, intense workout during your working day.

Each race will last for circa 30 minutes, with time to warm up beforehand if taking a 12.30pm lunch or earlier. Join in on both a Monday and Friday lunchtime at 12.45pm, and get those calories burned. What a great way to start or end the week, and keeping that mind and body focussed for the working afternoon.

Tullio CC is the UK wide business community for cyclists; centred around business and networking on the bike. Head to www.tullio.cc to find out more, or become a member and enjoy ample benefits, along with our regular rides and events across the UK.

If you’re already in Tullio, why not join the club Discord for race chat…

name: BMTR Short Adventure
description:
The BMTR Short Adventure is about having some group fun while also getting some endurance-paced time on the bike.

Our very experienced, friendly, and engaging ride leaders make sure a good time is had by all and keep the ride within the advertised average pace!

See you there!

name: Epictour - Structured Workout
description:
#Startyourweek with Epictour!

This is a short and intense ride! Our ride leader, Keri, will lead you through a 45min interval workout, with intervals at over your FTP value between 105% and 120%. Rubberband is in effect so that no matter how many watts you push, everyone will stick together. 

We are a friendly and welcoming bunch that like to work hard - if you've never ridden an Epictour ride, today is great day to start! 

This event is recurring. Same time next week with a new workout! 

Notes: 

- You will default to ERG mode.  If you prefer your smart trainer to not auto adjust resistance, deselect ERG in the menu before the ride to bring you to SIM mode ( https://support.zwift.com/en_us/erg-mode-in-workouts-SkQJC8OEH ), or you can do it in game. 

- The displayed peloton speed will be slower than anticipated. This will not affect your workout, but it is a quirky feature

Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/QK9vVdFjUJ

If you have questions about tech set-up for zwift or cycling in general,
please feel free to message us on our social platforms, we would be happy
to help you where we can!

https://www.instagram.com/epictourgranfondo/
https://www.facebook.com/Epictourgranfondo
https://www.strava.com/clubs/epic-tour

Epictour is a cyclist-first company from Toronto, Canada, producing events,
training programs and offering high-quality products. Our signature event is Epictour, the GTA's Granfondo. Sept 12 2021.

www.epictour.ca/check-us-out

name: The Common Empire Recovery Ride
description:
Join Common Empire for a Monday morning recovery group ride.
The purpose of this ride is to have fun and loosen up the legs from the
weekend's efforts. On this ride, we'll be riding between 2-3.5 w/kg
however, it is set as 'Keep everyone together'. Please follow the leaders
instructions to make it pleasant for all the participants.
#jointheride

name: Endure IQ Training Squad Session
description:
SESSION FOCUS:
The focus of this session is on building your tolerance to intensities similar
to those during a 70.3 triathlon. You will be working in the L3b training
zone. You should hope to see reduced HR drift within this zone as you complete
more of these sessions. From a physiological perspective, these sessions help
promote fat oxidation, and structural changes at a muscular level, such as
increased mitochondrial content and capillarization.

WARM-UP:
Progressive for 10 min
PREP SET:
5 x 30 sec L4/30 sec L1
2 min recovery
MAIN SET:
1 x 8 min reps at L3b (3 min recovery)
1 x 7 min reps at L3b (3 min recovery)
1 x 6 min reps at L3b (2 min recovery)
1 x 5 min reps at L3b (2 min recovery)
1 x 4 min reps at L3b (2 min recovery)
1 x 3 min reps at L3b (2 min recovery)
1 x 2 min reps at L3b
COOLDOWN:
10 min

name: Workout 3 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 3: Cadence Mastery
Dial in your cadence and watch everything else fall into place. This workout will have you switching between high and low cadence, all while keeping power steady, so outdoor riding feels more composed.

name: Stage 3: Pas Racing: Yumezi Grit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes — including the new Gravel Mountain map — in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Redrock Loop
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off at Redrock Loop on the brand-new Gravel Mountain map. A fast, punchy gravel test to set the tone. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Redrock Loop Reverse
Date: April 27 – May 3

Back for more on the brand new Gravel Mountain map. One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

(subgroup.label == 5 && scoring.current < 160)

name: ZZRC Espresso 2-2.5 Social Ride
description:
Welcome to our ZZRC Espresso 2-2.5wkg . This is a group ride, not a race, where we encourage riding together.

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

In 2015 ZZRC was founded and are one of the oldest established clubs on Zwift .

YELLOW BEACON will pace between 2-2.5 on the ride , with a possible increase of watts on inclines or sprints , but the average for the whole ride will be 2-2.5 .

We strongly promote group riding so on most of our rides we will use the Fence to help encourage that. Using a fence ensures that the ride is not over paced .

In the event of falling off the back of the main group , you will need to pace well over group pace to bridge the gap and catch .

This is where our awesome ZZRC sweeps and Ride Buddies will help you return to group using their draft. They will give you clear encouraging instructions to aid this process .

Our crew are a caring bunch who dedicated a lot of hours to this club , but want you to have the best ride experience on Zwift

You will be fully supported and encouraged throughout the ride by the Leader, Sweeps and Ride Buddies .

Our rides do not allow the use of TT Bikes as they do not draft and will require you to push harder on the ride, and in these instances our Sweeps will not be able to help you .

Mountain bikes operate very similarly, minimum draft so more watts (effort) will be required for the ride and any chase backs to group .

All our rides have a 30 minute late join feature which allows you to rejoin if you have technical issues or you find yourself out of the group in the early stages of the ride. Using this feature SHOULD teleport you back into the main group with our YELLOW BEACON .


We love to have a chat on our rides so join us on discord
<https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX>
Join the ZZRC Discord Server!<https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX>
discord.gg<https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX>
[favicon.ico]<https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX>


TOP TIPS

1) Stay close to the ride leader (or just in front on climbs), don’t let a gap form and the elastic snap!

2) Stay away from the Fence – We don’t like to fry anyone

3) Most important of all . . . HAVE FUN AND ENJOY THE RIDE.

#zzrc

Don’t forget to join our ZZRC-We Pace Not Race Facebook page and our club on the companion app

name: (Rubber-Banded) Ride with James' Friends!
description:
Join (some of) James' friends as we take on a number of different, varied routes across a number of different worlds.

This ride is banded. All riders will stay together regardless of their pace.

To keep up with latest events and news, please join the club here: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/389fbdf0-9cd7-4b42-8f76-4d1b6af240ae

name: Zwift Epic Race - The Muckle Yin
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial
